input.headline: The mystery of the abandoned Achill Island village of Slievemore

raw.headline: The mystery of the abandoned Achill Island village of Slievemore

winner: Why did the village on Achill Island leave Slievemore in a hurry? Because they heard there was a potluck at a different cliff!

candidates.text: Why did the village on Achill Island leave Slievemore in a hurry? Because they heard there was a potluck at a different cliff!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat creative with the potluck twist, but lacks strong surprise and specificity related to Slievemore or Achill Island. The humor feels a bit forced and generic."}

candidates.text: Why did the abandoned village on Achill Island move to the mountains? Because it wanted to be near Sliev-more hills!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat creative with the wordplay on 'Slievemore,' but the setup is a bit forced and lacks genuine humor or surprise."}

candidates.text: Why did the abandoned village of Slievemore abandon Achill Island? Because they found another place with fewer tourists.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat surprising and specific to the location, but it's a bit generic in its setup and lacks deeper humor or clever wordplay."}

candidates.text: Why did the village on Achill Island abandon its mystery at Slievemore? Because it decided to keep all its secrets to itself!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat playful but lacks strong surprise or specificity related to the headline. It uses a pun on 'mystery' but feels a bit forced and generic."}

candidates.text: Why did the abandoned Slievemore village move out west? Because it wanted to be on an island with a sea view!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 4.5, "reason": "Lacks surprise and specificity; the joke is generic and doesn't engage with the mystery or unique aspects of Slievemore village."}
